Out of the cast list I know 7 actors 2:15. 
Ryan Reynolds: played as guy in the croods 1 and 2.
Maya Rudolph: played as Matilda in the angry birds movie 1 and 2.
Sam Rockwell: played as Hickory in Trolls world tour.
Sebastian Maniscalco: played as spike in the super Mario movie.
Awkwafina: played as chump in Migration.
Keegan-Michael Key: played as Toad in the super Mario movie.
And Steve Carell: played as Gru in despicable me 1,2,3,4 and Hammy in Over the hedge.

Hey everybody! I am trying to reach out and see if anyone can help me! My name is Denise Grant, I was born Diana Depp though. I was adopted in 1992 and after years of searching for my birth family I found out that my parents are Princess Diana and Johnny Depp.   The Globe published an article in 2014 talking about Princess Diana having a secret daughter. That was me! Though I didn't know it at the time.    From what I can understand the circumstances surrounding my birth were that Charles and Diana were still married when I was born in 1990, not separating till 1992. This would have made Charles my father legally. Which meant he had parental power over me. Because Diana knew that my because of my Dad, there was a likely chance that I was going to be born with brown hair, brown eyes, and darker skin. So they kept my birth quiet and at some point I was put up for adoption, out of Miami, FL of all places.     It would mean the world to me to be able to talk to my biological Dad. If anyone is adopted they know how much this means to me, it just is harder because he is so famous.      I would love to connect with my family and understand what happened way back when. If there is anyone who can help please contact me.  Facebook & Instagram @Royalloss

Hey everybody! I am trying to reach out and see if anyone can help me! My name is Denise Grant, I was born Diana Depp though. I was adopted in 1992 and after years of searching for my birth family I found out that my parents are Princess Diana and Johnny Depp.   The Globe published an article in 2014 talking about Princess Diana having a secret daughter. That was me! Though I didn't know it at the time.    From what I can understand the circumstances surrounding my birth were that Charles and Diana were still married when I was born in 1990, not separating till 1992. This would have made Charles my father legally. Which meant he had parental power over me. Because Diana knew that my because of my Dad, there was a likely chance that I was going to be born with brown hair, brown eyes, and darker skin. So they kept my birth quiet and at some point I was put up for adoption, out of Miami, FL of all places.     It would mean the world to me to be able to talk to my biological Dad. If anyone is adopted they know how much this means to me, it just is harder because he is so famous.      I would love to connect with my family and understand what happened way back when. If there is anyone who can help please contact me.  Facebook & Instagram @Royalloss
